paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 5.93, with a change of -5.12% compared to the prior close and -31.52% over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 16, 2026.

Recent news headlines include questions about Fermi's governance practices and the valuation of its stock, with one article suggesting that the stock may be above fair value after a note offering. Another article reports on the resignation of director Miles Everson due to disagreements over governance practices. A social post mentions that Fermi is rebuilding, while another post notes an addition to a position in the stock.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the disclosure of the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was a filing related to the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
